div.p: Example: age > 21 AND status = 'active' sel(age>21) = 0.40, sel(status='active') = 0.25 result = 0.40 × 0.25 = 0.10
Equivalent form: sel = 1 − (1 − sel_L) × (1 − sel_R) Example: sel_L=0.3, sel_R=0.2 result = 0.3 + 0.2 − 0.06 = 0.44
Example: col has 50 distinct values WHERE col = 'x' → sel = 1/50 = 0.02 Est. rows = 0.02 × 100,000 = 2,000
est_rows = sel × row_count idx_cost = tree_height + est_rows × 4.0 scan_cost = page_count
